patch.value: pm get/show: did-you-mean suggestions for unknown IDs (telemetry: 233 hits/30d)

Telemetry shows item_not_found fires 233 times in 30 days. Agents are pasting IDs that are typos or stale.

Proposed: on item_not_found, run a cheap Damerau-Levenshtein over the in-memory id index and surface up to 3 nearest candidates in the error payload's `did_you_mean` field plus next_steps. Apply to pm get/show, pm update, pm close, pm claim, pm release, pm comments, pm files, pm docs, pm test, pm history.

Acceptance: regression tests for each command path; tests cover edge cases (no near matches, ambiguous matches).
